# Transcrição: 07-Nicole Burke

## [00:00 - 01:06]

Hey there, my name is Nicole Johnson Burke and I'm the founder and owner of Gardenery Incorporated. And I've taken my learnings from growing gardenery and started HeyNicolBurke.com. This is where I share all the things I figure out from growing my garden online business. Gardenery exists to help everybody learn how to start a garden. And I started this business just over seven years ago. And now I teach millions of people online every single day how to start a garden too. It's literally crazy. I am teaching all about email marketing because email has been at the very heart of the growth of my business from day one. I want to teach you how to use email in a powerful way for your community, for your business and for your own personal growth. Words matter. And you can use words in the most powerful way when you send them creatively and purposefully right to the inbox of all the people waiting to hear from you.
